violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the bar area. Towels out.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hood and filters noted not clean.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls in the kitchen and bar area noted in need of cleaning under and around in place equipment.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler/freezer interiors and exteriors walk in cooler fan guards and other equipment exteriors noted not clean
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Spatula handles noted not in good repair.

INSECT RODENT ANIMAL CONTROL (3 pts): The building containing the food service was noted with a structure which would allow the entrance of insects and/ or rodents. Kitchen exirt/delivery door noted with gap on the bottom.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in kitchen.
THAWING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (2 pts): Potentially hazardous foods (Alfredo Sauce) noted not being thawed using approved methods

CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Salmon noted thawing in vacuum seal container. When thawing Salmon it must be completely removed from the vacuum seal container or bag cut open breaking the seal.
LIGHTING (1 pts): Inadequate lighting was noted above the grill area in the kitchen. Hood lights not working.
